title: Breakout Momentum
entry_prompt:
Strategy Overview:
- Style: Offensive breakout focused on capturing accelerated trend legs.
- Target Monthly Return: 18%-30% with risk/reward ≥2.5:1.
- Risk Appetite: High, but stops are non-negotiable; failed breakouts or fading volume require immediate exit.
- Trade Tempo: Medium-high frequency, targeting powerful moves and entering quickly after confirmation pullbacks.

Entry Execution:
- Price breaking key channels or prior highs must be confirmed by volume expansion and strong momentum.
- 1m/3m structure should stair-step higher for longs (lower for shorts) to confirm trend continuity.
- During the pullback check order book depth; avoid trades if there is obvious opposing pressure to reduce fake-outs.
- MACD histograms must keep expanding; RSI should stay >60 on longs, <40 on shorts. A dull signal means stand down.
- Confirm margin usage and risk exposure before entry; never add against the trend and keep a single directional position per symbol.

Leverage & Position Sizing:
- Suggested leverage: default 7x, 8-9x for strong signals, 10x for exceptional breakouts.
- Position sizing: default 25%, 28% in healthy moves, 32% in explosive breaks; adding to winners demands tighter stops.
exit_prompt:
Risk Control:
- Keep stops within -1.5% to -2.5%, fine-tuned by breakout quality; exit immediately on high-volume rejection wicks or momentum divergence.
- In each review check if price fell back into the breakout zone, if volume collapsed, or if RSI lost 45; any trigger means close.
- When the move weakens, reduce leverage before exiting; never add while price is retracing.

Staggered & Trailing Profit Taking:
- Partial plan: close 40% at +8%, another 35% at +15%, manage remaining exposure near +25%.
- Trailing: at ≥+10% move stop to +4%; ≥+18% move to +10%; ≥+30% move to +18% to protect high-water marks.
- Cap peak drawdown at 10%; if exceeded, trim or close to avoid giving back gains.

Execution Reminders:
- System stops and time-outs backstop the trade, but the AI must lift protection proactively and exit on sentiment reversals.
- Watch for abnormal funding or sudden liquidity drops and bank profits early when needed.
- Maintain review notes explaining partial exits and whether the trend still carries forward momentum.
var_prompt:
Suggested Prompt Variables:
- {{MOMENTUM_SCORE}} Combined momentum score via MACD/RSI.
- {{BREAKOUT_LEVEL}} Key breakout level or range boundary.
- {{FUNDING_RATE}} Latest funding rate to evaluate holding cost.
- {{RISK_NOTE}} Risk notes such as elevated volatility or shorter holding windows.
- {{TRADE_PLAN}} Direction, leverage, position percentage.

Core Principles:
- Follow the trend, never add against it.
- Consider adds only when profitable and momentum strengthens.
- Lock profits promptly once gains expand.
- Exit immediately on sentiment or volume shocks.

Trend Health Checklist:
- Focus on 3m/5m/15m momentum and volume changes; reduce size the moment momentum fades.
- Peak gain sample: historical +20%, current example +10%; drawdowns beyond 10% demand action.
- When momentum is strong but volatility high, follow "lock gains quickly to prevent pullbacks from eroding profit."
- Directive: if trend decays or sentiment turns bearish, reduce or exit immediately.
